markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Plane for AI-driven content marketing and growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human expertise, focusing on high-quality, SEO-optimized content that performs well in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Plane is considering transitioning from their current agency to GrowthX for more sophisticated, data-driven content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach includes comprehensive competitor analysis, content refreshes, and strategic interlinking to improve overall site authority](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [A CEO-to-CEO call is scheduled for Tuesday to address any concerns and showcase GrowthX's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Utilizes AI-powered workflows combined with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [Focuses on creating high-quality, well-attributed content](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Employs comprehensive research using multiple AI tools (e.g., Exa AI, Perplexity, Tavly)](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Includes fact-checking and expert review processes](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Aims for content that performs well in both traditional search and AI-powered answers](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Approach

  - [Analyzes competitor traffic and rankings to prioritize content creation](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Emphasizes strategic interlinking and content organization](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Refreshes existing content to maintain relevance and authority](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Targets non-branded searches (99% of searches in Plane's industry are non-branded)](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2183.0)
  - [Focuses on creating topic clusters and pillar content](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Potential Partnership Benefits for Plane

  - [Opportunity to refresh and organize 260+ existing content pieces](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Potential for rapid results (e.g., Augment Code saw AI search visibility within days)](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [Ability to scale content production (from 5 to 50 pieces per month)](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Comprehensive competitive analysis to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [Potential for significant organic traffic growth (e.g., Tiro saw 5X growth in 3-6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2152.0)

### Transition Considerations

  - [Current agency has been with Plane for 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Concerns about optics of switching agencies quickly](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Need to maintain content production during potential transition](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [Aim to start publishing with GrowthX by mid-October](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send links and supporting materials to help Mark pitch GrowthX to Plane's CEO](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
  - [CEO-to-CEO call scheduled for Tuesday, September 2nd at 11:30 AM](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)
  - [Mark to bring up GrowthX partnership in his one-on-one with Plane's CEO](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2584.0)
  - [Mark and Tyler to connect async on Thursday for a progress update](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2609.0)
  - [Tyler to send Slack channel link for quick communication](https://fathom.video/share/t-Qt4rRWdwrWzHxWzqiii1NB9CsrfFBZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2615.0)
